title: Mock Town Shows Its Teeth
description: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Bellamy, Zoro, Nami, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate. A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: This looks more like a warzone...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: So who the hell really knows...?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Some sort of devil fruit ability...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Seems like he's got business with you.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Look, it's the same guys from earlier.

summary: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
